description_long: This is an upright piano with a weathered, distressed wooden exterior, featuring a rectangular form and a flat top. The front panel is adorned with two decorative wreath motifs, and the keyboard is fully exposed, showing a standard arrangement of white and black keys. The wood appears aged, with visible wear, scratches, and discoloration, giving it a rustic, urban character. The sides and back are plain, with the back panel showing a large, unadorned surface. The legs are simple and sturdy, supporting the main body above the ground. No pedals or music stand are visible, and the lid above the keys is either missing or permanently open.
description: A weathered upright piano with a distressed wooden finish, exposed keyboard, and decorative front panel. The piano shows signs of age and urban use, with no visible pedals or music stand.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full keyboard, decorative wreath motifs, and the detailed, worn wood texture.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the piano's depth, flat top, and the thickness of the wooden panels.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying a plain, unadorned back panel with a faded, aged finish.
description_view_3: Right side view similar to the left, showing the side profile and the exposed keyboard.
attribute_keyboard_layout: Standard keyboard layout with approximately 52 white keys and 36 black keys in alternating groups, no visible missing or non-standard keys.
attribute_lid_position: Lid above the keys is not present or permanently open
